channel.title: GeneralElectionNow on LRG
channel.description: Recent content in GeneralElectionNow on LRG

item.title: Tweet - 1143647834333503488
item.description:
Don’t forget folks, whichever way this goes, Jeremy Hunt OR Boris Johnson will be PM. The only people that can make this choice are Tory party members. Go ahead and ignore @bbclauraktwitter.com and @Pestontwitter.com et al, because there’s literally fuck all you can do about it. #GeneralElectionNow

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0

item.title: Tweet - 1138922826461831168
item.description:
General election now. General election now. General election now. General election now. General election now. General election now. General election now.

General election now.

General election now.

General election now. #GeneralElectionNow

What do we want?

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0

item.title: Tweet - 1131938830360162305
item.description:
Only thing giving me hope right now is the number of Brexity Tories on Twitter that don’t believe Baby Johnson could deliver anything different to May. So they’ll be pissing their votes away on BxP or UKIP. #GeneralElectionNow

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0

item.title: Tweet - 1131868131465617408
item.description:
Hold onto your hats kids. Mogg’s going to get his Johnson out, and Gove it both barrels.

#GeneralElectionNow

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0

item.title: Tweet - 1131263226677792768
item.description:
I hope she doesn’t quit. Seriously. Almost nothing could fill me with more fear than the prospect of the Mogg-Johnson-Gove axis of excrement. #GeneralElectionNow

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0
